parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'accepted', tts_text: 'Nachschub wird vorbereitet.', source: 'n8n', correlation_id: $json.correlation_id }) }}

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ correlation_id: $json.correlation_id, picking_id: $json.picking_id, product_id: $json.product_id, location_id: $json.location_id, recommended_location_id: $json.recommended_location_id, recommended_location: $json.recommended_location, quantity: $json.quantity, reason: $json.reason, ticket_text: $json.ticket_text, requested_by_user_id: $json.requested_by_user_id, requested_by_name: $json.requested_by_name }) }}
